_comment: Single source of truth for model selection. Edit this file to change which models the app uses per GPU VRAM tier, then run Update-Models.ps1 to pull them. The backend reads this on startup (falls back to built-in defaults if the file is missing or invalid). 'whisper' is an openai-whisper size (downloaded automatically by Whisper). 'text' and 'vlm' are Ollama tags (must be pulled via 'ollama pull').
